'''bovazhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:caboshed|caboshed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-v-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:caboshed|caboshed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bovazhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bovazhithi|bovazhithi]] || [[word:bovazhiji|bovazhiji]] || [[word:bovazhishi|bovazhishi]] || [[word:bovazhiki|bovazhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bovazhuthuthu|bovazhuthuthu]] || [[word:bovazhujuju|bovazhujuju]] || [[word:bovazhushushu|bovazhushushu]] || [[word:bovazhukuku|bovazhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bovazhuthu|bovazhuthu]] || [[word:bovazhuju|bovazhuju]] || [[word:bovazhushu|bovazhushu]] || [[word:bovazhuku|bovazhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bovazhufthuf|bovazhufthuf]] || [[word:bovazhufjuf|bovazhufjuf]] || [[word:bovazhufshuf|bovazhufshuf]] || [[word:bovazhufkuf|bovazhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bovazhethe|bovazhethe]] || [[word:bovazheje|bovazheje]] || [[word:bovazheshe|bovazheshe]] || [[word:bovazheke|bovazheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bovazhothotho|bovazhothotho]] || [[word:bovazhojojo|bovazhojojo]] || [[word:bovazhoshosho|bovazhoshosho]] || [[word:bovazhokoko|bovazhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bovazhotho|bovazhotho]] || [[word:bovazhojo|bovazhojo]] || [[word:bovazhosho|bovazhosho]] || [[word:bovazhoko|bovazhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bovazhofthof|bovazhofthof]] || [[word:bovazhofjof|bovazhofjof]] || [[word:bovazhofshof|bovazhofshof]] || [[word:bovazhofkof|bovazhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bovazhĂŻfthĂŻf|bovazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bovazhĂŻfjĂŻf|bovazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bovazhĂŻfshĂŻf|bovazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bovazhĂŻfkĂŻf|bovazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bovazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|bovazhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bovazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|bovazhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bovazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|bovazhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bovazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|bovazhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bovazhĂŻfthĂŻf|bovazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bovazhĂŻfjĂŻf|bovazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bovazhĂŻfshĂŻf|bovazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bovazhĂŻfkĂŻf|bovazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bovazhĂŻfthĂŻf|bovazhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bovazhĂŻfjĂŻf|bovazhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bovazhĂŻfshĂŻf|bovazhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bovazhĂŻfkĂŻf|bovazhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bovazhĂŠthĂŠ|bovazhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:bovazhĂŠjĂŠ|bovazhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:bovazhĂŠshĂŠ|bovazhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:bovazhĂŠkĂŠ|bovazhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bovazhathatha|bovazhathatha]] || [[word:bovazhajaja|bovazhajaja]] || [[word:bovazhashasha|bovazhashasha]] || [[word:bovazhakaka|bovazhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bovazhatha|bovazhatha]] || [[word:bovazhaja|bovazhaja]] || [[word:bovazhasha|bovazhasha]] || [[word:bovazhaka|bovazhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bovazhafthaf|bovazhafthaf]] || [[word:bovazhafjaf|bovazhafjaf]] || [[word:bovazhafshaf|bovazhafshaf]] || [[word:bovazhafkaf|bovazhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bovazhasha|bovazhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bovazhshĂ«sha|bovazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bovazhrosha|bovazhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bovazhmusha|bovazhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bovazhyasha|bovazhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobovazhnkshĂ«sha|gobovazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobovazhnkrosha|gobovazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobovazhnkmusha|gobovazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobovazhnkyasha|gobovazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bovavazhasha|bovavazhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bovavazhshĂ«sha|bovavazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bovavazhrosha|bovavazhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bovavazhmusha|bovavazhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bovavazhyasha|bovavazhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobovavazhnkshĂ«sha|gobovavazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobovavazhnkrosha|gobovavazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobovavazhnkmusha|gobovavazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobovavazhnkyasha|gobovavazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:bevĂŠzhasha|bevĂŠzhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bevĂŠzhshĂ«sha|bevĂŠzhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bevĂŠzhrosha|bevĂŠzhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bevĂŠzhmusha|bevĂŠzhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bevĂŠzhyasha|bevĂŠzhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobevĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha|gobevĂŠzhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobevĂŠzhnkrosha|gobevĂŠzhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobevĂŠzhnkmusha|gobevĂŠzhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobevĂŠzhnkyasha|gobevĂŠzhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bovfazhasha|bovfazhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bovfazhshĂ«sha|bovfazhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bovfazhrosha|bovfazhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bovfazhmusha|bovfazhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bovfazhyasha|bovfazhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobovfazhnkshĂ«sha|gobovfazhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobovfazhnkrosha|gobovfazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobovfazhnkmusha|gobovfazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobovfazhnkyasha|gobovfazhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
